nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Andaman bulbul
nodes.summary: The Andaman bulbul (Microtarsus fuscoflavescens) is a member of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is endemic to the Andaman Islands. It has a mainly olive-yellow plumage and has most of the head olive. It feeds on small fruit and berries, but will also take insects. Until 2008, the Andaman bulbul was considered as a subspecies of the black-headed bulbul. References Rasmussen, P.C., and J.C. Anderton (2005). Birds of South Asia. The Ripley Guide. Volume 2: Attributes and Status. Smithsonian Institution and Lynx Edicions, Washington D.C. and Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The Andaman bulbul (Microtarsus fuscoflavescens) is a member of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is endemic to the Andaman Islands.

nodes.name: Microtarsus
nodes.summary: Microtarsus（Microtarsus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Puff-backed bulbul、Yellow-wattled bulbul、Grey-headed bulbul等7种鸟类。
